Hi, my name is

Kay Hwang.

I'm an Aspiring Data Scientist

I am passionate about Machine Learning and Autism Research.

MY PROJECTS

About Me

Currently I am a student at Harvard University. I started coding around as a sophomore in high school. Since then I have explored the realm of Machine Learning and Autism research through personal projects and my concentration in BioStatistics. I have experience with Python, Java, SQL, HTML, and CSS. I also enjoy creating art to illustrate the prevalence of mental health/disability struggles in today's society!
